DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT HENDERSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AS IT WAS NOT TIMELY SERVED. CCP SECTION 1005, AS AMENDED BY AB 3078, CHAPTER 171, STATUTES OF 2004, REQUIRES THAT MOTIONS BE SERVED AND FILED 16 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING, WITH FIVE CALENDAR DAYS ADDED IF THE MOTION WAS SERVED BY MAIL. AS THIS MOTION WAS FILED ON FEBRUARY 23, 2005, THE NEW PROVISIONS APPLY. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
